description: Deterministic review lenses inspired by distinct AI-agent working styles. These are QA perspectives, not claims that external proprietary models executed the checks.

lenses.label: MAX strict release lens
lenses.mission: Assume the release is unsafe until every retry, gate and evidence chain proves otherwise.
assertions: A first browser failure may trigger one bounded recheck, never an unlimited retry loop.
A repeated failure remains a hard release blocker.
The required visual status-check name remains stable.
First and repeated attempts remain available as evidence.
Generated integrity evidence must be current for the exact head.

lenses.label: Qwen structured edge-case lens
lenses.mission: Check structured completeness across languages, compact screens and data boundaries.
assertions: TR, EN and RU language controls remain present on customer routes.
The matrix covers 320, 360, 390 and 412 pixel phone widths.
Search clears back to the complete menu result set.
Unknown profiles and invalid retry settings fail fast.
Every matrix result records profile, route, attempts and final status.

lenses.label: Grok hostile-user lens
lenses.mission: Try weird, impatient and misleading actions that a polite happy-path test would miss.
assertions: Lookalike or malformed Instagram profile URLs are rejected.
Repeated pairing actions cannot collapse Taste Journey into one stuck state.
Broken images, duplicate ids and horizontal overflow block the scenario.
External-network failure cannot hide a broken local social contract.
Unsafe output directories and invalid environment values are rejected before execution.

lenses.label: Manus autonomous journey lens
lenses.mission: Complete the user task from entry to outcome and verify recovery when a step changes state.
assertions: Landing, menu and Taste Journey each expose a deterministic ready selector.
Menu search, clear and language-switch flows complete end to end.
Taste Journey changes pairing before and after marking an item discovered.
Primary actions remain visible, named and inside the viewport.
A machine-readable summary is produced for every route and device profile.

lenses.label: Gemini multimodal visual lens
lenses.mission: Judge composition, images, responsive layout and visual evidence together.
assertions: Landing, menu and Taste Journey receive full-page visual captures.
Social offer, menu sharing and pairing card receive dedicated captures.
Phone, tablet, laptop and desktop visual profiles are represented.
Dynamic media, animation and external pixels are stabilized before comparison.
Visible images decode successfully and broken images fail the matrix.

lenses.label: GPT product-system lens
lenses.mission: Connect interface behavior to customer intent, business truth and system consistency.
assertions: Menu discovery, directions and Instagram remain reachable through primary actions.
The canonical Roby's Instagram profile is consistent across landing, menu and typed offer source.
The menu keeps more than ten rendered products before filtering.
Language state changes the document language on menu and Taste Journey.
A UX fix must update its cache revision so returning visitors receive it.

lenses.label: Claude careful safety lens
lenses.mission: Prefer explicit semantics, conservative failure and inspectable evidence over clever shortcuts.
assertions: Keyboard focus reaches a visible control with a focus-specific visual state change.
Primary controls expose accessible names and safe external-link attributes.
Every page keeps one main landmark, a visible h1 and a non-empty title.
Network-derived diagnostics are sanitized before persistence.
Review evidence is tied to the current pull-request head rather than a stale commit.
